---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

[📄 Download PDF version](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

---

## Education

**Ph.D. in [Your Field]** — *Expected [Year]*  
Your University, City, State  
Advisor: Professor Name  
Dissertation: *"Working Title of Your Dissertation"*

**B.S. / B.A. in [Your Field]** — *[Year]*  
Undergraduate University, City, State  
*Honors / GPA if relevant*

---

## Research Experience

**Graduate Research Assistant** — *[Year]–Present*  
Lab or Center Name, Your University  
Description of your research responsibilities.

**Undergraduate Research Assistant** — *[Year]–[Year]*  
Lab Name, University  
Description of work done.

---

## Publications

See the [Research](research.qmd) page for a full list.

---

## Teaching Experience

**Teaching Assistant** — *[Semester Year]*  
Course Name (DEPT 101), Your University  

---

## Awards & Fellowships

- Award Name — *Year*
- Fellowship Name — *Year*
- Scholarship Name — *Year*

---

## Skills

**Programming:** R, Python, Julia, MATLAB (list yours)  
**Tools:** Git, LaTeX, QGIS (list yours)  
**Languages:** English (native), Spanish (intermediate)

---

## Service

- Conference reviewer for: *Conference Name, Journal Name*
- Departmental committee, year–year
